fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the migration table to which the error applies.

fields.name: Field Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the field in the migration table to which the error applies.

fields.name: Error Text
fields.tooltip: Specifies the text of the error in the migration field. You can use information contained in the error text to fix migration problems before you attempt to apply migration data to the database.

fields.name: Field Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption of the migration field to which the error applies.

fields.name: Table Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption of the migration table to which the error applies.
